title: Execution State Machine
purpose: Implement deterministic execution state machine to formalize execution transitions, eliminate invalid runtime states, and support deterministic orchestration.
architectural_constraints: 9 states defined with valid transitions only
No direct state mutation outside the state machine
All transitions logged to governance event bus
acceptance_criteria: 9 states with valid transitions defined: idle, planning, validating, executing, blocked, recovering, consolidating, deploying, archived
Failure transitions defined for all non-terminal states
Recovery transitions defined for blocked and recovering states
All state mutations emit governance events
No runtime state mutation outside canonical transitions

failure_modes.scenario: State machine too rigid for edge cases
failure_modes.mitigation: Emergency transitions with mandatory audit, recovery paths for all states
Enforcement engine validates all mutations, CI gates detect direct mutations
